name: Lard Cake
recipeInstructions:
Mixed with 1/3 cup water.
1. Separate the eggs and beat the whites until frothy.
2. Beat in half a cup of sugar; keep beating until the whites form stiff peaks.
3. In another mixing bowl, cream the lard with the remaining cup of sugar.
4. When the butter mixture is softened, add flour, salt, and baking powder. Mix for about a minute.
5. Add egg yolks, evaporated milk mixed with water, and vanilla. Mix well.
6. Carefully fold in the egg white mixture.
7. Bake in a 3-by-4-inch buttered cake tin for 30 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
